series_metadata.series_title: Applications to participate in Economic Development programs
series_metadata.series_description: Completed applications submitted to the Economic Development department by individuals that wish to participate in one of the linked-deposit programs administered by the department. Documentation includes applicant information, loan details, compliance certifications, and other information that varies based on the specific linked-deposit program to which the applicant is applying.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain applications until the later of (a) conclusion of fiscal year in which application was submitted, plus an additional 3 fiscal years, or (b) conclusion of fiscal year in which corresponding loan for an approved application was scheduled for final payment plus 1 additional fiscal year. ; Electronic: Retain applications until the later of (a) conclusion of fiscal year in which application was submitted, plus an additional 3 fiscal years, or (b) conclusion of fiscal year in which corresponding loan for an approved application was scheduled for final payment plus 1 additional fiscal year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
